title: nepeta meyeri
intro: Nepeta meyeri, also known as catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which aid in the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nepeta meyeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate anxiety and insomnia, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. Nepeta meyeri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
